microsoft_ft: Scaled Azure's **recovery validation program** from a 2-person operation into a platformized system, standardizing enterprise deployment workflows to sustain 45+ annual drills across partners including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led **0→1 development** of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining self-service scheduling requirements that cut operational toil by 30% and transitioned execution to a scalable, repeatable model across engineering teams.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability, delivering a rack-level drill program in 4 months with a **94% recovery rate**, surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a new continuous-validation standard.

Directed 14 cross-org recovery executions under executive visibility, including serving as **bridge lead** for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract with stringent compliance constraints.

Built an **internal AI agent** for drill planning and restructured workflows, reducing planning cycle time by 39% and increasing drill capacity by 21% — a field-driven contribution later adopted into core platform planning tooling.

Translated executive resilience goals into **concrete engineering roadmaps**, decomposing ambiguous requirements into sprint-ready workstreams and aligning 6+ partner teams on unified delivery milestones and technical decision frameworks.
microsoft_2023: Championed **enterprise adoption** of AI-driven code generation workflows, running technical demos and training sessions that drove utilization across 14 customer engineering teams and saved **37 engineering hours** monthly.

Shaped the product roadmap toward intent-based YAML generation by conducting 11+ embedded user interviews with Azure service teams, surfacing critical feature gaps and translating field insights into actionable requirements.

Accelerated enterprise developer workflows by implementing rigorous metadata standards and migrating documentation to an **AI-powered semantic search** platform, cutting lookup time by 83% across distributed engineering teams.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched Azure regions 28% faster by securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework spanning 140+ engineering teams across the enterprise.

Identified **81 hours of manual toil** per region launch through discovery with 20+ service teams, then built a phased roadmap to automate critical deployment paths and eliminate recurring operational bottlenecks at scale.

Engineered a **Power BI dashboard** tracking operational toil across 140+ teams, enabling engineering leadership to target automation gaps and allocate resources toward the highest-impact deployment improvements each quarter.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot transition by defining the legacy OS migration strategy, mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations, and coordinating rollout with embedded cross-functional engineering teams.

Facilitated Agile sprint planning and retrospectives within a fast-moving engineering org, **prioritizing 40+ high-priority tickets** and stabilizing the developer intake process to unblock downstream hardware deployment cycles.

Drove alignment across IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and establishing reusable patterns that cut future release overhead.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by redesigning the end-to-end scoping and invoicing lifecycle for 200+ monthly proposals, deploying a new CRM integration that standardized workflows and reduced manual data entry across the sales team.

Reduced **Customer Acquisition Cost by 13%** and boosted conversion rates by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, including targeted website optimization and structured Google Business profile improvements.

Improved leadership pricing decisions by conducting **financial profitability analysis** across 1,000+ project records, identifying and sealing margin leaks that had gone undetected across multiple service categories.
